message.content:
(1) **Eyebrow line**: Centered (with leading dash). The text "A FREE · SCIENCE-BASED FIELD GUIDE" is now horizontally centered, including the leading dash.  
(2) **Headline**: Centered. "Why Did I Say That?" is fully centered.  
(3) **Subtitle**: Centered. The paragraph text is centered and wraps appropriately.  
(4) **Email input + button**: Stacked, full-width, and centered. The input field and "Send me the PDF" button are stacked vertically, each spanning the full width of the container, and centered.  
(5) **Checkmark trust items**: Centered (wrapping). The three items ("Under an hour to read", "References to every study", "A 14-day plan...") are now centered and wrap as needed.  
(6) **Remaining issues**: None. All elements are properly aligned, spaced, and no overflow occurs. The layout is responsive and visually consistent.
